runs.summary: Financial Services, Defence, and Real Estate showing momentum leadership as Nifty consolidates near 24,200 post a 9% April recovery on RBI cut and geopolitical easing.
Capital Goods, Pharma, and Automobiles showing volume-backed technical breakouts as Nifty stabilises above 23,800 on easing macro headwinds.
Defence, IT and pharma leading broad-based momentum rally on Nifty recovery above 23,500.
